raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Where things stand","name":"Before we get into specifics, what feels most worth talking through today?","description":"Safe opener that lets Elena set the agenda without priming a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Reorg aftereffects","name":"Since the reorg, what has changed most in your day-to-day work?","description":"Surfaces concrete shifts in operating rhythm without assuming the cause.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Forum pullback","name":"What changed about the leadership forums for you?","description":"Opens the shift in forum participation without framing it as a problem.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team touchpoints","name":"Where do you feel least plugged into the team right now?","description":"Looks for the specific interaction points where connection has thinned.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"What shifted underneath","name":"What do you think has shifted underneath that?","description":"Invites her interpretation of the change without forcing a diagnosis.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope fit check","name":"What part of your current scope feels most natural to you right now?","description":"Helps distinguish temporary transition load from a better or worse fit in the current shape of the role.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support gap","name":"What support would actually take friction out of the next two weeks?","description":"Moves from concern to concrete support Elena can use immediately.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"What would you want more of from me right now?","description":"Surfaces the specific manager behavior that would help most without assuming she has asked already.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority tradeoff","name":"What are you saying yes to and no to right now?","description":"Reveals the current priority tradeoffs created by the reorg.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Designated closer that lands on immediate action and support.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
